candidate_llm_application: LLM activation decoherence: simultaneous magnitude and phase corruption of latent vectors as a ZQ-error; topologically protected attention routes information around defects.

results.title: Noise-Robust Attention / Fault-Tolerant Inference: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on noise-robust attention / fault-tolerant inference, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (noise-robust attention / fault-tolerant inference); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (ZQ-noise-decoherence terms vs LLM terms).
